ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily financial data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the financial_instruments table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the financial data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the day */,
  "previous_1d" REAL /* Closing price of the previous day */,
  "ema_12" REAL /* Exponential Moving Average over the last 12 days */,
  "willr_14" REAL /* Williams %R value over the last 14 days */,
  "obv_7" REAL /* On-Balance Volume over the last 7 days */,
  "labels" INTEGER /* Label to categorize the financial data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the trading model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtesting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtesting result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the trading_strategies table */,
  "backtest_date" TEXT /* Date of the backtesting event */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Performance metric (e.g., return, Sharpe ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the data label */,
  "label_description" TEXT /* Description of the data label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)
